message:
fix: streamline release preflight to version-tag check only

The release workflow was running cargo fmt, clippy, and tests in
preflight, duplicating checks already enforced by ci.yml on every push
to main. This caused release failures for cosmetic issues (e.g. fmt
diffs) even when the code was functionally correct. Strip preflight to
only verify tag matches Cargo.toml version.

Fixes Dicklesworthstone/beads_rust#66

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -27,32 +27,17 @@ permissions:
   attestations: write  # Required for artifact attestations
 
 jobs:
-  # Pre-flight checks before building release
+  # Pre-flight: only verify tag matches Cargo.toml version.
+  # Formatting, clippy, and tests are already enforced by ci.yml on push to main.
+  # Duplicating them here caused release failures for cosmetic issues (e.g. cargo fmt
+  # diffs, flaky tests) even when the code was functionally correct.
   preflight:
     name: Pre-flight Checks
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    timeout-minutes: 15
+    timeout-minutes: 5
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683  # v4.2.2
 
-      - name: Install Rust toolchain
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
-        with:
-          toolchain: nightly
-          components: rustfmt, clippy
-
-      - name: Cache cargo
-        uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@ad397744b0d591a723ab90405b7247fac0e6b8db  # v2
-
-      - name: Verify formatting
-        run: cargo fmt --all -- --check
-
-      - name: Run clippy
-        run: cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings
-
-      - name: Run tests
-        run: cargo test --all-features
-
       - name: Verify tag matches Cargo.toml version
         run: |
           CARGO_VERSION=$(grep '^version' Cargo.toml | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\(.*\)".*/\1/')
